notes: Restores optional helper/small-action Google Tasks checklist items to manual project steps and routine activities.
Manual project/routine activity forms now preserve the automatic main checklist item while allowing one or more extra small action checklist items.
Creation Wizard target dates now use a date field by default.
Wizard date inputs display in New Zealand day/month/year format while retaining ISO storage for exports.
Project start and finish time wizard steps now use form-style text entry to avoid Streamlit time-input refresh/React instability and let Next submit the entered time.
Repository downloads include only the latest Windows package.
release: v0.6.23 Helper checklist and NZ date repair
release_name: Helper checklist and NZ date repair
release_notes: Restores optional helper checklist items for manual project/routine activities, uses NZ date display in the Creation Wizard, defaults the project target checkpoint to a date, and repairs project time-entry steps by using form submission rather than Streamlit time_input.
